frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai shaadi ab risky investment lagti hai 😅 aajkal prenup bhi necessary hai, warna baad mein alimony aur 498A ka darr alag. Genuine cases alag hain, but sach mein one-sided laws ka fayda bahut log uthate hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as likely to exploit marriage and legal protections for financial gain while presenting men as the primary victims. It encodes concern-for-men's-rights framing, references prenups as protection from women, and invokes 498A misuse/generalized suspicion toward women.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
